sources.ranking: FIFA/Coca-Cola Men's World Ranking, released 2026-04-01 (last release before the tournament; next update 2026-06-11). https://inside.fifa.com/news/france-1st-fifa-coca-cola-world-ranking-april-2026 — full 48-team table cross-checked via https://www.sportingnews.com/us/soccer/news/fifa-rankings-world-cup-teams-updated-calculated/mxphm9f5h9j81ti9rkhvnqhc and https://thedatabetics.com/insights/highest-ranked-teams-at-world-cup-2026/
sources.odds: Primary: Opta supercomputer pre-tournament simulation (25,000 sims), published 2026-06-01, https://theanalyst.com/articles/who-will-win-2026-fifa-world-cup-predictions-opta-supercomputer (additional Opta figures via https://www.thatsagoal.com/predictions/world-cup/opta-supercomputer-world-cup-2026-predictions and https://www.soccernews.com/world-cup-predictions-spain-look-to-dethrone-messis-argentina/399954/). Secondary: Ladbrokes outright winner odds for all 48 teams, 2026-05-12, https://www.bets.com.au/soccer/world-cup/fifa-world-cup-2026-winner-odds-20260512-0006/ — used as winProb (implied probability, 1/decimal*100) only where Opta did not publish a team's exact percentage; those entries have winProbSource 'bookmaker-implied'. Note: bookmaker implied probabilities include overround (~118% market total), Opta percentages sum to ~100%.

Uruguay.notes: No exact Opta percentage published; Opta article places Uruguay close to USA's 1.2%.

Switzerland.notes: No exact Opta percentage published; Opta article places Switzerland close to USA's 1.2%.

United States.notes: Co-host. Most fancied of the three hosts per Opta.

Japan.notes: Opta ranks Japan 17th overall, highest AFC side.

Mexico.notes: Co-host. Plays opening match at Estadio Azteca.

Senegal.notes: Opta article states Senegal level with Mexico at 1.0%.

Austria.notes: Opta article: joint 22nd-likeliest winner, level with Canada and Paraguay (0.5%).

Canada.notes: Co-host. Opta: joint 22nd, level with Paraguay and Austria.

Paraguay.notes: Opta article: joint 22nd, level with Canada and Austria (0.5%).

Egypt.notes: Salah's final World Cup; Opta rates Egypt among biggest bottom-half threats.

Czech Republic.notes: No exact Opta percentage published. FIFA lists as Czechia.

Australia.notes: Won 28 of 25,000 Opta sims; 59.2% chance of reaching knockouts.

Scotland.notes: Won 22 of 25,000 Opta sims; 66.1% chance of exiting group stage successfully.

Bosnia and Herzegovina.notes: No exact Opta percentage published. Qualified via UEFA play-off (beat Italy on penalties).

Iran.notes: No exact Opta percentage published. FIFA rank (21) far exceeds market rating.

South Africa.notes: Opta: joint 37th-likeliest winner but 49.3% chance of reaching knockouts.

New Zealand.notes: No exact Opta percentage published. Lowest-ranked team in the field; 47.8% chance of escaping Group G per Opta.

Uzbekistan.notes: Debutant. 41.4% chance of reaching knockouts per Opta.

Cape Verde.notes: Debutant. No exact Opta win percentage published; reached knockouts in only 33.9% of Opta sims.

DR Congo.notes: No exact Opta percentage published. Qualified via inter-confederation play-off.

Jordan.notes: Debutant. 40.8% chance of reaching knockouts per Opta.

Iraq.notes: No exact Opta percentage published. First World Cup since 1986.

Haiti.notes: Won 1 of 25,000 Opta sims (0.004%); rated weakest team in the field. First World Cup since 1974.

Curacao.notes: Debutant, smallest nation ever at a World Cup. Won 0 of 25,000 Opta sims; only team never to win in any simulation.
